title: Coral Chorus
description: Dive into a vibrant undersea world as the Lumina Jelly. Emit rhythmic sonic pulses to nurture blooming corals, awaken hidden life, and soothe agitated sea creatures, pushing back against the encroaching murk.
tagline: The ocean's rhythm awaits your touch!

title: Lumina Link
description: Guide the Lumina Bloom through enchanting twilight groves. Use your radiant tether to draw in drifting Sun Droplets, awaken slumbering ancient spirits, and gently redirect the mischievous Gloom Wisps before they dim the

title: Stardust Surge
description: Pilot a nimble Star-Sprite through treacherous cosmic lanes. Dash past swirling nebulae, dodge rogue asteroids, and collect shimmering Stellar Shards to fuel your momentum and outrun the encroaching Dark Matter.

title: Clockwork Echo
description: Stabilize a city inside a giant clock, gather time sparks, calm runaway mechanisms, and face the final midnight resonance.
